name: agent-platform
description: Agent Platform v0.6.0 with RAG, MCP, and Docker Sandboxing

scripts.setup:venv: python -m venv venv && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: npm run dev:services && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run setup:venv && cd frontend && npm install
